consensus.overall_description: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket and neckline, white striped sleeve cuffs, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.
patches: Black Rose Collection rectangular woven patch on lower right front with decorative border
consensus.stitching_details: clean seams throughout, piping sewn along front opening and neckline
